title: Request More Users Modal with Zapier Integration
story: As a product administrator, I want to request additional user seats through a modal dialog, so that I can expand my account's sharing capacity while we build out the purchasing flow.
description:
Add a modal dialog that allows account owners to request additional user seats. The page displays the current user limit (from the Plans model's `account_member_quantity` field) and an 'Add More Users' button that opens a modal with a message explaining the beta program, a numeric input for the requested number of users, and a Submit button.

On submit, the request is sent to a Zapier webhook (event 0006) without updating the database. A toast notification confirms the request was sent. The actual seat increase will be handled externally until the purchasing flow is built.
acceptance_criteria: Current user limit is displayed on the account management page
Clicking 'Add More Users' opens a modal with explanatory text and a numeric input
Submit sends the request to the Zapier webhook without updating the database
A toast notification confirms 'Request for users sent'
The numeric input only accepts numbers
ux_changes: Modal dialog with beta program message, numeric input, and Submit button. Toast notification on successful submission. Current user limit displayed on the account page.
middleware_changes: Endpoint that sends the user request data to a Zapier webhook (event 0006) without modifying the Plans model's account_member_quantity.
api_changes: Outbound POST to Zapier webhook with user_id, eventid (0006), eventname, message, and user_ip_address.
implementation_notes: The modal was initially wired to update the database directly. This was changed to only send to Zapier, serving as a request that is manually fulfilled. The purchasing flow will replace this in the future.
comment_summary: Developer initially implemented with database update. Product directed to only send to Zapier and show a toast confirmation. Zapier endpoint was changed once due to testing issues. Final implementation sends event 0006 to Zapier without modifying the user count.
